name: Wilted Spinach & Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 5 oz fresh spinach, torn into bite-sized pieces
1 cup Cooked rice, cooled to room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crisp; drain on paper towels, then crumble.
2. Reserve 2 tablespoons drippings.
3. Combine spinach, rice, mushrooms, tomatoes, and onion in a large mixing bowl.
4. In a small saucepan, combine vinegar, sugar, salt, pepper, mustard, reserved drippings, and 2 tablespoons water.
5. Heat the mixture just to boiling.
6. Pour the dressing over the salad; toss lightly.
7. Garnish with bacon and serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
